sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Hand-to-Hand Combat
special_mechanics.description: Primary combat mechanic focusing on punching, kicking, jump kicks and roundhouse kicks rather than weapon-based gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Scuba Diving Stage
special_mechanics.description: NES exclusive fourth side-scrolling shooter stage featuring aquatic movement mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Pursuit Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Game maintains distance tracking between player characters and pursuing enemy army; if distance reaches 0km, mission fails and stage restarts

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): No precise physics documentation available. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and story information but no technical movement parameters, collision data, or sub-pixel calculations. NES port maintains arcade character design and basic gameplay with reduced weapon availability and emphasis on combat techniques.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Ikari III NES page)
wikipedia - Ikari III: The Rescue article
